name: Homemade Mounds Bars (2)
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the corn syrup for 1 minute.
2. Add the chopped coconut and stir until combined.
3. Let sit for 2 hours.
4. Wet your hands and form the mixture into small balls.
5. Place the balls in a single layer on a greased cookie sheet.
6. Freeze the balls for about 30 minutes or until firm.
7. Melt the chocolate chips and canning wax together.
8. Dip each frozen coconut ball into the melted chocolate mixture.
9. Place the dipped balls back onto the greased cookie sheet to set.
